title: Tardive Dyskinesia Pre-Screening
description: Pre-screen patients for tardive dyskinesia risk using the two-curve irreversibility model: recovery decay × receptor supersensitivity

tools.name: screen
tools.description: Pre-screen a patient for tardive dyskinesia risk. Returns irreversibility score (0-1), risk category, recovery capacity, and clinical recommendation based on drug class, exposure duration, age, dose, and prior episodes.

parameters.name: duration_months
parameters.description: Duration of antipsychotic/dopaminergic exposure in months

parameters.name: drug_class
parameters.description: Drug class: typical_high_potency, typical_low_potency, atypical, dopaminergic, antiemetic, other

parameters.name: dose_ratio
parameters.description: Dose relative to standard (1.0 = standard dose, 2.0 = double)

parameters.name: prior_episodes
parameters.description: Number of prior reversible dyskinesia episodes

recovery_capacity.description: R(t) — remaining recovery capacity (1.0 = full, 0.0 = none)

receptor_supersensitivity.description: H(t) — receptor supersensitivity level (0.0 = none, 1.0 = saturated)

recovery_window.description: OPEN or CLOSING — whether recovery is still possible

recommendation.description: Clinical recommendation based on risk level

tools.name: trajectory
tools.description: Project tardive dyskinesia risk trajectory over time for a patient profile. Shows how irreversibility score, recovery capacity, and supersensitivity evolve month by month, and when the critical boundary is crossed.

parameters.name: drug_class
parameters.description: Drug class: typical_high_potency, typical_low_potency, atypical, dopaminergic, antiemetic, other

boundary_crossing_month.description: Month when recovery drops below critical threshold (null if not crossed)

tools.name: drug-classes
tools.description: List all drug classes with their tardive dyskinesia risk modifiers and example medications

drug_classes.description: Drug classes sorted by risk (highest first)
